references.text: König, J, M Siwakoti, HH Hilger & M Weigend. 2015. A revision of the genus Cynoglossum L.(Boraginaceae Juss.) in Nepal and notes on the widespread Asian species. Phytotaxa 224: 1-28.
Riedl, H. 1997. Boraginaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 13: 43-144

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 6 February 2020

species.citation: (J.Jacq.) Druce , Bot. Exch. Club Brit. Isles Rep. 4 (1917) 610 ; Riedl, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 13 (1997) 63; ≡ Anchusa zeylanica Vahl ex J.Jacq. , Ecl. Pl. Rar. 1 (1813) 47; Type: Plate in J. Jacq., Eclogae 1 (1813) 47. = Bothriospermum tenellum (Hornem.) Fisch. & C.A.Mey. , Index Seminum (St.Petersburg) 1 (1835) 24 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 379; Backer & Bakh. f., Fl. Java 2 (1965) 463; ≡ Anchusa tenella Hornem. , Hort. Bot. Hafn. (1813) 176; Type: from China.
species.distribution: Afghanistan, Bangladesh, China, India, Japan, Korea, Mongolia, Nepal, Pakistan, Philippines, Russia, Ryukyu Isls, Sri Lanka, Taiwan, Vietnam, W Asia. LUZON: Benguet.
species.notes: Waste places about rice paddies, along streams. 1300-1500m.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 22 September 2025

species.citation: Forssk. , Fl. Aegypt.-Arab. (1775) 41 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 379; Riedl, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 13 (1997) 87; König et al., Phytotaxa 224 (2015) 13; Type: from Yemen.
species.distribution: Afghanistan, Africa, Bangladesh, Bhutan, Borneo, China, Himalayas, India, Indochina, Japan, Java, Laos, Middle East, Myanmar, Nepal, Pakistan, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. LUZON: Abra (photos), Benguet, Cagayan, Mountain Province, Nueva Vizcaya.
species.notes: Montane meadows and thin pine forests. Medium elevation to 1100m (photos) to 2000m.

species.citation: (Sw. ex Lehm.) Thunb. ex Brand , Repert. Spec. Nov. Regni Veg. 13 (1915) 546 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 379; ≡ Myosotis zeylanica Sw. ex Lehm. , Neue Schriften Naturf. Ges. Halle 3 (1817) 20. = Cynoglossum furcatum Wall. , Fl. Ind. (Carey & Wallich) 2 (1824) 6 ; Riedl, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 13 (1997) 83; König et al., Phytotaxa 224 (2015) 8; Type: described from a plant in the Botanical Garden, Calcutta, native in Nepal.
species.distribution: Afghanistan, Bhutan, China, Himalayas, India, Japan, Java, Myanmar, Nepal, Pakistan, Philippines, Thailand, Vietnam. LUZON: Benguet, Mountain Province, Nueva Vizcaya, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Davao del Sur, PANAY (photos).
species.notes: Chiefly on montane meadows or grassy slopes. 800m (photos) to 1200-2200m.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 21 October 2017

species.citation: (L.) Sm. , Cycl. 36 (1817) n.1 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 395; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 378; Riedl, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 13 (1997) 124; ≡ Borago indica L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 137; Type: Herb. Linn. J88/2 (LINN).
species.distribution: Afghanistan, India, Indian Ocean, Myanmar, Pakistan, Philippines. LUZON: Bataan, La Union (photos), NCR, Rizal.

species.citation: (Burm.f.) R.Br. , Prodr. Fl. Nov. Holland. (1810) 496 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 396; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 378; Riedl, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 13 (1997) 125; ≡ Borago zeylanica Burm.f. , Fl. Ind. (N. L. Burman) (1768) 41; Type: Burman f., Fl. Indica t. 14. f. 2.
species.distribution: Africa, India, Indian Ocean, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Madagascar, New Guinea, Philippines, Sri Lanka. LUZON: Batangas, Cagayan, Ilocos Norte, NCR, Nueva Ecija, Pampanga, Rizal.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 21 October 2017

species.citation: Elmer , LPB 7 (1915) 2562 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 379; Riedl, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 13 (1997) 130; Type: Elmer 11500 (NY 2 sheets, US, iso), Mindanao: Davao, Mt Apo.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Cotabato, Davao, Davao del Sur, PANAY.

species.citation: Merr. , PJS 1(Suppl.) (1906) 228 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 380; Riedl, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 13 (1997) 137; Type: Merrill 4700, Luzon.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Benguet, Ifugao, Mountain Province.

species.citation: Riedl , Blumea 38 (1994) 464 ; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 13 (1997) 139; Type: BS 19575 McGregor (L, holo), Luzon: Ifugao, Mt Polis.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Ifugao.
species.notes: Known only from the type collection.
